title: aspalathus serpens
intro: Aspalathus serpens, also known as the "Cape tea" or "red bush", is a species of flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is rich in antioxidants, particularly aspalathin, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Aspalathus serpens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
